_comment: Base per-model rates in USD per 1,000,000 tokens. Cache multipliers (5m write 1.25x, 1h write 2x, read 0.1x) are universal and live in pricing.py, NOT here. Keys are exact model ids as they appear in transcript message.model. Update from platform.claude.com/docs/en/docs/about-claude/pricing when rates change.
_source: platform.claude.com pricing, fetched 2026-05-27; Fable 5 added 2026-06-10 ($10/$50, claude-api skill reference). Opus 4.5/4.6/4.7/4.8 = $5/$25 (4.8 mirrors the constant Opus-tier rate — confirm against published pricing); Sonnet 4.5/4.6 = $3/$15; Haiku 4.5 = $1/$5. Sonnet 5 added 2026-07-02 ($3/$15 standard rate — the $2/$10 intro rate through 2026-08-31 is NOT modeled here since this table has no time-based logic; standard rate slightly overcounts cost during the intro window instead of silently undercounting).
